title: micropholis cylindrocarpa
intro: Micropholis cylindrocarpa, also known as the Yellow Bubba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Micropholis cylindrocarpa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically harvested, dried, and used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
